title: AURORA, 33773, Palm Pals Chatty Mouse 5In, Soft Toy, Grey
features: Introducing Palm Pals Chatty Mouse, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Chatty’s dream has always been to motivate and help others through their toughest challenges. With all the wisdom he has learned, he radiates positivity in all his speeches. This soft toy is a cute and cuddly, grey-coloured mouse filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. Chatty Mouse is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable starfish-soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Forest collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Critters, Aquatic, Whimsical and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Chatty Mouse measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, Everyone will fall in love with this adorable grey-coloured mouse which has a cute smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Meet Chatty Mouse, the newest member of Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. Chatty’s dream has always been to motivate and help others through their toughest challenges. With all the wisdom he has learned, he radiates positivity in all his speeches. This soft toy is a cute and cuddly, grey-coloured mouse filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand. This adorable mouse-soft toy comes under the Palm Pals forest collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Critters, Whimsical and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Chatty Mouse measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, Everyone will fall in love with this adorable grey mouse which has a cute smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range. As part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, Chatty Mouse comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable and cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience designing and manufacturing innovative, high-quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
